name: Uganda Museum
description: The oldest museum in Uganda showcasing cultural heritage.

name: Kasubi Tombs
description: UNESCO World Heritage Site and burial grounds of Buganda kings.

name: Kololo LDS Church
description: A meetinghouse of The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints serving multiple congregations in Kampala.

name: Kabaka's Palace
description: Official residence of the Kabaka of Buganda.

name: Ndere Cultural Centre
description: A center showcasing Uganda's traditional culture.

name: Gaddafi National Mosque
description: One of the largest mosques in East Africa.
